name: ProtoKinetix, Inc.
summary: ProtoKinetix, Inc. is a research and development stage biotechnology company focused on Anti-Freeze Glycoproteins (AFGPs), trademarked as AAGPs (Anti-Aging Glycoproteins). The company sponsors scientific medical research on the AAGP molecule and is pursuing commercial validation in healthcare markets, including targeted health care solutions. For fiscal year 2024, the company incurred $99,625 in R&D expenses. ProtoKinetix was originally incorporated as RJV Network, Inc. in Nevada in 1999.
